Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Union Pacific Railroad Company To Compel The Depositions Of Plaintiffs
Off Calendar May-20-2014 Continued To Jun-10-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 503
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Gina Bauer of FLESHER BROOMAND McKAGUE LLP (916-358-9042) appearing via CourtCall for defendant / moving party Union Pacific Railroad Company
Kimberly Chu of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties Leila Stringfellow, et al.

RULING:
DEFENDANT UNION PACIFIC RAILROAD COMPANY.'S MOTION TO COMPEL THE DEPOSITIONS OF PLAINTIFFS

Pursuant to parties' request, the Court made the following ruling: Defendant Union Pacific Railroad Company's motion to compel the depositions of plaintiffs Mary Jean Wozny, Marlene Warlick and Rebecca Cummings is continued to June 10, 2014 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 503. A stipulation and order regarding the continuance of hearing and briefing schedules was signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Jeannie M. Chimpky of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #12742 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)
